import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut current = ""
  mut a_str = ""
  mut b_str = ""
  mut got_a = false
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if not done
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          if not string.is_empty(current)
            if not got_a
              a_str = current
              got_a = true
              current = ""
            else
              b_str = current
              done = true
              current = ""
            end
          end
        else
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not done
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if not got_a
        a_str = current
      else
        b_str = current
      end
    end
  end
  let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  println("gcd=#{g}")
end
